items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of click/session attribution records, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or data related to this requirement. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga, such as resource creation and booking activities, without addressing the necessary attribution records. Therefore, it is not possible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap.
